Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis, -- Haemoglobin Concentration: numeric lab result. Will be stored as value_as_number in a later ETL step. Definition not found in docs/. Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalLaboratoryResultsVarious.HaemoglobinConcentration.@value' as HaemoglobinConcentration from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HA' and HaemoglobinConcentration is not null;

Explanation.Description: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED) is the date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: The haemoglobin concentration recorded during a Haematological Cancer Care Spell. Note: definition not found in docs/.
